name: RAG Chatbot Demo
Demonstrates a complete end-to-end RAG pipeline using OpenSearch as the vector store.
The wizard guides the user through four steps:
1. Configuration — Review OpenSearch connection settings, authentication type, and embedding model. Test the connection before proceeding.
2. Upload & Embed — Enter an index name, upload .txt or .md files, and embed the documents into OpenSearch as searchable vector chunks.
3. Results — Inspect all indexed chunks with their source file and a content preview.
4. Chat — Ask questions answered by an AI agent that retrieves grounded context from the indexed documents via the openSearchSearch tool.
